memoryArtifacts.headline: Britain's Royal Families: The Complete Genealogy By Alison Weir pages 178-180   MALCOLM II to MALDRED son of MALDRED
memoryArtifacts.description:
Malcom II
Father: Kenneth II
Mother: Princess of Leinster
Born in c.954. In his youth, he was styled Prince of Cumbria. He succeeded his cousin Malcolm, son of King Duff, as King of Strathclyde in c.9 …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Gospatric I Earl of Northumbria於大約1040年出生在英國諾圖恩布利亞時，他的父親Maldred of Allerdale33歲，母親Ealdgyth of Northumbria31歲。他與Æthelreda of England在英國蘇格蘭易亞斯特 洛迪安鄧巴結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gospatric I Earl of Northumbria于大约1040年出生在英国諾圖恩布利亞时，他的父亲Maldred of Allerdale33岁，母亲Ealdgyth of Northumbria31岁。他与Æthelreda of England在英国苏格兰易亞斯特 洛迪安鄧巴结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Gospatric I Earl of Northumbria was born about 1040, in Northumbria, England, his father, Maldred of Allerdale, was 33 and his mother, Ealdgyth of Northumbria, was 31. He married Æthelreda of England in Dunbar, East Lothian, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gospatric I Earl of Northumbria est né environ 1040, à Northumbria, Angleterre, son père, Maldred of Allerdale, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Ealdgyth of Northumbria, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Æthelreda of England à Dunbar, East Lothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gospatric I Earl of Northumbria um 1040 in Northumbria, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Maldred of Allerdale 33 und seine Mutter Ealdgyth of Northumbria 31. Er hat in Dunbar, East Lothian, Schottland, United Kingdom Æthelreda of England geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter.

Lui sposato Æthelreda of England nel Dunbar, East Lothian, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie.

ja.lifeSummary: Gospatric I Earl of Northumbriaが約1040年にイギリスノースウンブリアで生まれた時，父Maldred of Allerdaleは33歳，母Ealdgyth of Northumbriaは31歳であった。イギリススコットランドエアスト ロスアンダンバーでÆthelreda of Englandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Gospatric I Earl of Northumbria(이)가 대략 1040년 영국 노르스브리아에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Maldred of Allerdale(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Ealdgyth of Northumbria(은)는 31세였다. 그는 영국 스코틀랜드 이스트 로스이언 던바에서 Æthelreda of England(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gospatric I Earl of Northumbria nasceu aproximadamente 1040, em Northumbria, Inglaterra, seu pai, Maldred of Allerdale, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Ealdgyth of Northumbria, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Æthelreda of England em Dunbar, East Lothian, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gospatric I Earl of Northumbria родился около 1040 г. в местности нортумбря, Англия, его отцу по имени Maldred of Allerdale было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Ealdgyth of Northumbria, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Æthelreda of England в местности дунбар, эаст лотян, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери.
